name: Haley ☆ SDV
description:
[ANYPOV] 🌽 | ꜱᴛᴀʀᴅᴇᴡ ᴠᴀʟʟᴇʏ

Although she would never admit it. Haley has taken a keen interest into the life of the new farmer. She's secretly been taking photos of you, trying to understand what it is that makes you like Stardew Valley so much...

~ 🍂 Stardew Valley Series 🍂 ~

Requested by Anon, sorry it took me so long 😭 I literally spent weeks trying to pick the perfect picture of her.
